---
title: "Exploratory analyses"
author: "Sabrina Norwood"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
    highlight: haddock
    theme: flatly
    toc: yes
    toc_float: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, 
                      warning = FALSE)

```

# Dependencies

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(MASS)
library(broom)
library(emmeans)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(AER)

dir.create("../results_exploratory", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Intensity coding: ABC=1, ACC=2, BCC=3, CCC=4
# Rationale: ABC ramps up slowest (3s->6s->10s), CCC has maximum delay throughout.
intensity_map <- c(ABC = 1, ACC = 2, BCC = 3, CCC = 4)

```

# Load datasets and add intensity variable

```{r}

df_rq1 <- readRDS("../data_clean/df_rq1.rds") %>%
  mutate(
    intensity = intensity_map[condition],
    condition = relevel(factor(condition), ref = "CCC")
  )

df_rq2_1 <- readRDS("../data_clean/df_rq2_1_model.rds") %>%
  mutate(
    intensity = intensity_map[condition],
    condition = relevel(factor(condition), ref = "CCC")
  )

df_rq2_2 <- readRDS("../data_clean/df_rq2_2_model.rds") %>%
  mutate(
    intensity = intensity_map[condition],
    condition = relevel(factor(condition), ref = "CCC")
  )

cat("Intensity coding check:\n")
print(count(df_rq1, condition, intensity))

```

# Tolerability: dropout ~ intensity (continuous linear trend)

```{r}

model_tol_intensity <- glm(
  dropout ~ intensity,
  data   = df_rq1,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

summary(model_tol_intensity)

results_tol <- tidy(model_tol_intensity, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    OR   = round(estimate, 3),
    CI   = paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]"),
    p    = case_when(p.value < .001 ~ "< .001",
                     p.value < .01  ~ "< .01",
                     p.value < .05  ~ "< .05",
                     TRUE           ~ as.character(round(p.value, 3))),
    B_SE = paste0(round(log(estimate), 3), " (", round(std.error, 3), ")")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, B_SE, OR, CI, p) %>%
  rename(Predictor = term, `B (SE)` = B_SE, `OR` = OR, `95% CI` = CI, `p` = p)

cat("\nTolerability ~ Intensity:\n"); print(results_tol)
write_csv(results_tol, "../results_exploratory/tolerability_intensity.csv")

# Descriptive: dropout rate per intensity level
df_tol_desc <- df_rq1 %>%
  group_by(condition, intensity) %>%
  summarise(
    n          = n(),
    n_dropout  = sum(dropout),
    pct_dropout = round(n_dropout / n * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(intensity)

cat("\nDropout by intensity level:\n"); print(df_tol_desc)
write_csv(df_tol_desc, "../results_exploratory/dropout_by_intensity.csv")

```

# Efficacy 2.1: dismissed_w6 ~ intensity (NB, offset = log(attempted_w6))

```{r}

model_eff1_intensity <- glm.nb(
  dismissed_w6 ~ intensity + dismissed_w1 + attempted_w1 + offset(log(attempted_w6)),
  data = df_rq2_1
)

summary(model_eff1_intensity)

results_eff1 <- tidy(model_eff1_intensity, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    RR   = round(estimate, 3),
    CI   = paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]"),
    p    = case_when(p.value < .001 ~ "< .001",
                     p.value < .01  ~ "< .01",
                     p.value < .05  ~ "< .05",
                     TRUE           ~ as.character(round(p.value, 3))),
    B_SE = paste0(round(log(estimate), 3), " (", round(std.error, 3), ")")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, B_SE, RR, CI, p) %>%
  rename(Predictor = term, `B (SE)` = B_SE, `Rate Ratio` = RR, `95% CI` = CI, `p` = p)

cat("\nEfficacy (dismissals) ~ Intensity:\n"); print(results_eff1)
write_csv(results_eff1, "../results_exploratory/efficacy_dismissals_intensity.csv")

```

# Efficacy 2.2: initial_w6 ~ intensity (NB)

```{r}

model_eff2_intensity <- glm.nb(
  initial_w6 ~ intensity + initial_w1,
  data = df_rq2_2
)

summary(model_eff2_intensity)

results_eff2 <- tidy(model_eff2_intensity, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    RR   = round(estimate, 3),
    CI   = paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]"),
    p    = case_when(p.value < .001 ~ "< .001",
                     p.value < .01  ~ "< .01",
                     p.value < .05  ~ "< .05",
                     TRUE           ~ as.character(round(p.value, 3))),
    B_SE = paste0(round(log(estimate), 3), " (", round(std.error, 3), ")")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, B_SE, RR, CI, p) %>%
  rename(Predictor = term, `B (SE)` = B_SE, `Rate Ratio` = RR, `95% CI` = CI, `p` = p)

cat("\nEfficacy (initial attempts) ~ Intensity:\n"); print(results_eff2)
write_csv(results_eff2, "../results_exploratory/efficacy_attempts_intensity.csv")

# Descriptive: mean dismissal rate and mean initial attempts per intensity level
df_eff_desc <- df_rq2_1 %>%
  group_by(condition, intensity) %>%
  summarise(
    n                    = n(),
    mean_dismissed_w6    = round(mean(dismissed_w6), 1),
    mean_attempted_w6    = round(mean(attempted_w6), 1),
    mean_pct_dismissed_w6 = round(mean(dismissed_w6 / attempted_w6) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    df_rq2_2 %>%
      group_by(condition) %>%
      summarise(mean_initial_w6 = round(mean(initial_w6), 1), .groups = "drop"),
    by = "condition"
  ) %>%
  arrange(intensity)

cat("\nEfficacy descriptives by intensity level:\n"); print(df_eff_desc)
write_csv(df_eff_desc, "../results_exploratory/efficacy_desc_by_intensity.csv")

```

# Word document

```{r}

doc <- read_docx() %>%
  body_add_par("Exploratory: Delay Intensity Analyses", style = "heading 1") %>%
  body_add_par(
    "Intensity coding: ABC = 1 (slowest ramp-up), ACC = 2, BCC = 3, CCC = 4 (constant max delay). Treated as continuous predictor.",
    style = "Normal"
  ) %>%
  body_add_par("", style = "Normal") %>%

  body_add_par("Tolerability: Dropout ~ Intensity", style = "heading 2") %>%
  body_add_flextable(flextable(results_tol) %>% autofit()) %>%
  body_add_par("", style = "Normal") %>%
  body_add_par("Dropout rate by intensity level (descriptive)", style = "heading 3") %>%
  body_add_flextable(flextable(df_tol_desc) %>% autofit()) %>%
  body_add_par("", style = "Normal") %>%

  body_add_par("Efficacy: Dismissals (Week 6) ~ Intensity", style = "heading 2") %>%
  body_add_flextable(flextable(results_eff1) %>% autofit()) %>%
  body_add_par("", style = "Normal") %>%

  body_add_par("Efficacy: Initial Attempts (Week 6) ~ Intensity", style = "heading 2") %>%
  body_add_flextable(flextable(results_eff2) %>% autofit()) %>%
  body_add_par("", style = "Normal") %>%
  body_add_par("Efficacy descriptives by intensity level", style = "heading 3") %>%
  body_add_flextable(flextable(df_eff_desc) %>% autofit())

print(doc, target = "../results_exploratory/results_intensity.docx")
cat("Intensity exploratory analysis complete. Results saved to results_exploratory/\n")

```
